title: Un Pere Theriyadhu Lyrics Engeyum Eppodhum Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Lyrics : Na Muthukumar 
Music Director : Sathya C
Movie: Engeyum Eppodhum

Un Pere Theriyadhu, unnai koopida mudiyadhu 
Naan unakorr per vaithaen, unnake theriyadhu
Andha perai ariyaadha,ada yaarum ingaedhu
Adha orumurai sonnale, thookam varaaadhu
Ada dhinam dhorum adhai solli unnai konjuven
Naan adangaatha anbale unnai minjuven

You never find a better time
Make a stand you w'll be fine

hOh.. soodaana perum adhuthaan
Sonnavudan udhadugal kodhikum
Suriyanai neyum ninaithaal adhu illaye
Hooh..chillendra perum adhuthaan
Ketavudan nenjam kulirum
Nadhi endru neyum ninaithaal adhu illaye
Silirkavaikum dheivamillai
Miratavaikum mirugamillai
Olivattam therindhaalum, adhu pataa perillai
En perin pinnal varum per naan sollava..?

You never find a better time
Make a stand you w'll be fine

Peridhaana perum ahduthaan, Solla sila mooche vaangum
Ethanai ezhuthukal endral vidai illaye
Sirithaana perum adhuthaan, Sattendru mudindhe pogum
Eppadi solven naano mozhi illaye....

Sollivittal udhadu ottum, Elluthivittal thaenum sottum
Adhu sutha tamil perthan, ayal varthai adhil illai
En perin pinnal varum per naan sollava..?

Un Pere Theriyadhu, unnai koopida mudiyadhu 
Naan unakorr per vaithaen, unnake theriyadhu
Ada dhinamdhorum adhai solli unnai konjuven
Naan adangaatha anbale unnai minjuven

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Un Pere Theriyadhu'?

The song expresses feelings of unrequited love and the pain of not being able to reveal one's true feelings.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Engeyum Eppodhum'?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the emotional struggles of the characters involved.

Who is the singer of 'Un Pere Theriyadhu'?

The song is sung by the talented Madhusree, known for her expressive vocal style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Un Pere Theriyadhu' was composed by Sathya C, who is known for his melodious tunes.

When was 'Un Pere Theriyadhu' released?

The song was released on August 5, 2011, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Un Pere Theriyadhu', the protagonist grapples with the pain of unspoken love, beautifully conveyed through Madhusree's emotive singing. The song encapsulates the essence of longing and the struggle to express one's feelings, making it relatable to many. Set against the backdrop of Engeyum Eppodhum, it enhances the emotional depth of the narrative. The soothing melody and poignant lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and melancholy, resonating with listeners who have faced similar heartaches.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Pere Theriyadhu from the movie Engeyum Eppodhum is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of unexpressed love. With Madhusree's soulful vocals and Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced longing. The unique collaboration of heartfelt lyrics and soothing music makes this track a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: Unknowingly, you can't call out your name. I gave you a name, but you don't know it. If someone were to say that name, you wouldn't wake up. Every day, I keep saying it to you, and I can't let go of you with love.
You never find a better time. Make a stand, you'll be fine.

Oh.. the great name is just that. With the name, troubles arise. If you think of the sun, it won't be there. Oh.. the great name is just that. With the name, the heart cools down. If you think of the river, it won't be there. There is no god for laughter, and there is no animal for fear. Even if you find the right path, it won't be easy. Should I say that my name will come after me?
You never find a better time. Make a stand, you'll be fine.

The great name is just that, some words will take it away. If there are so many writings, there is no end. The great name is just that, it will end after a while. How can I say it when I have no words?
If you say it, it will be a burden. If you write it, it will be necessary. That is pure Tamil, there are no foreign words in it. Should I say that my name will come after me?

Unknowingly, you can't call out your name. I gave you a name, but you don't know it. If someone were to say that name, you wouldn't wake up. Every day, I keep saying it to you, and I can't let go of you with love.
